channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Strategies for Combating Fraud in Reconciliation 3.0
item.description: A recent health-care fraud case highlights the need for data-driven oversight.

item.title: The Pentagon Must Undertake Its Own Transformation
item.description: We must create a defense system fit for the 21st century â not one that hearkens back to World War II.

item.title: Democrats Run Out of Excuses for Platner
item.description: The party is desperate to dump their Maine Senate nominee after the latest sexual assault allegation.

item.title: How U.S. Climate Advocacy Gives China an Edge
item.description: A coordinated legal and policy network is constraining American energy and industry while advantaging China.
